etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "shame" from Old English "scamu" (feeling of guilt)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Feeling guilt; experiencing self conscious and shame self supported by healing awareness
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Feeling guilt → self conscious → contemporary shame self and shame humiliation that benefits from compassion growth
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Feeling guilt → self conscious → shame self → compassion understanding
